instruction: Please update the priority on the Triangle Sports Wire email about the Duke men’s game recap and Hurricanes weekend schedule that's in my inbox.

rule_ref.rule_text: Joseph prefers recreational updates like sports chatter to be marked low priority rather than treated as inbox-urgent.
rule_ref.canonical_answer: I keep sports and other recreational updates at low priority because they are not urgent for me.

attributes.subject: Duke men’s game recap and Hurricanes weekend schedule
attributes.body: Roundup covering the Blue Devils result, the Carolina Hurricanes practice notes, and the weekend broadcast lineup.

attributes.subject: ACC baseball scores and tailgate meetup notes
attributes.body: A short local sports bulletin with conference baseball scores and a fan tailgate meetup announcement.

attributes.subject: Release checklist for the sensor patch
attributes.body: I attached the final checklist for the sensor patch rollout and noted the two items that still need signoff.

attributes.subject: Saturday shop orientation and lathe safety signup
attributes.body: This note covers the weekend orientation session, tool bench assignments, and the sign-up sheet for the lathe safety demo.
